general.name: swiftDialog Banners Notifications
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>F10FB12D-0D60-4CD4-8C0F-7755296CD38B</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>F10FB12D-0D60-4CD4-8C0F-7755296CD38B</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>swiftDialog Banners Notifications</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Notifications Payload</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>82863DEA-3FA2-4DF9-BE3E-992A5213E637</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.notificationsettings</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>502F782F-1B11-437B-94FA-DE9220F73EBE</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>NotificationSettings</key><array><dict><key>AlertType</key><integer>1</integer><key>BadgesEnabled</key><true/><key>BundleIdentifier</key><string>au.bartreardon.dialog</string><key>NotificationsEnabled</key><true/><key>ShowInLockScreen</key><true/><key>ShowInNotificationCenter</key><true/><key>SoundsEnabled</key><true/></dict></array></dict></array></dict></plist>
